subject: v1.21 release: Windows cross-platform hardening
description: Fixed ~30 Windows-specific test flakes. Key fixes: path separator normalization in cwd-clamp, tmpdir handling in stats-sqlite, skip markers for file-based SQLite tests on Windows. All CI checks green.

subject: Add per-session token accounting to all MCP tools
description: Migrated from global stats to session-keyed accounting using CLAUDE_SESSION_ID. Fixes concurrent terminal clobbering. See _stats.ts refactor.

subject: Implement redirect-by-default for Read/Grep/Edit hooks
description: Changed default ASHLR_HOOK_MODE from 'nudge' to 'redirect'. Added isInsideCwd safety net so out-of-scope paths fall back to nudge. Added ASHLR_HOOK_MODE env override.

subject: Deploy genome auto-consolidate + LLM synthesis
description: Genome now auto-consolidates proposals into knowledge/ on session end. LLM synthesis uses local Ollama or cloud override. Cache TTL 1h. Falls back to snipCompact on LLM failure.

subject: Fix status-line animation: session delta not lifetime
description: Status line was showing lifetime savings instead of session delta. Root cause: savings-status-line.ts was reading from the wrong stats key. Fixed by switching to session-scoped read.
